description: Unwrapping fetched auxiliary-data bytes down to the label-309 value. All three Conway envelope forms MUST be accepted, dispatching purely on the top-level CBOR type and tag — never on map-key inspection. The three positive forms carry the same chunk array and reassemble to the same record body. METADATA_NOT_FOUND is the verifier-layer outcome for well-formed auxiliary data with no label-309 entry; it is record-attributable because the bytes are hash-bound to the requested transaction before unwrapping.

vectors.name: metadata-map
vectors.note: An untagged map is always the metadata map itself.

vectors.name: metadata-with-scripts-array
vectors.note: The two-element [transaction_metadata, auxiliary_scripts] form; the metadata map is element 0.

vectors.name: tag-259-keyed-map
vectors.note: The tag-259 form; the metadata map sits under integer key 0.

vectors.name: untagged-map-with-integer-key-0-is-metadata
vectors.note: Dispatch is on top-level type and tag only: an untagged map is the metadata map itself, never key-sniffed into the keyed-wrapper form. This map's only label is 0, so it carries no label-309 entry.

vectors.name: tag-259-no-key-0
vectors.note: Well-formed auxiliary data that simply carries no metadata map.

vectors.name: metadata-map-no-309
vectors.note: Well-formed metadata under another label only; a verifier ignores every label other than 309.

vectors.name: tag-258-rejected
vectors.note: Any tag other than 259 at the top of the auxiliary data is rejected.

vectors.name: top-level-byte-string-rejected
vectors.note: Any top-level shape other than map, array, or tag-259 is rejected.
